commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Google Chat auth, webhook parsing, inbound access policy, message processing and dedupe, outbound media/threading, and the old dock reply default to improve Space handling and duplicate webhook behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR review blockers: PR-head and current-main source comparison shows the auth binding removal, sender-policy downgrade, broad BOT mention match, raw logging, dedupe, and lifecycle defects. I did not run live Google Chat traffic in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because this external PR lacks real behavior proof, is conflicting, changes security-sensitive auth/access paths, and includes a reply-default product decision while narrower Google Chat PRs already cover parts of the work.

target.title: (googlechat) fix: space messaging, introduce deduplication, and update reply-to defaults
target.author: lamdt1
